title: Thriller Bark’s Zombies Awaken: Key Exchange

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's the story behind thriller bark.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Huh....!! So it's bad for them...

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: It's fine!! We still have time.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
